title: Pouches
description: Adds several pouches - small carriable inventories which accept a limited set of items - to make inventory management easier during exploration while maintaining balance
body:
This mod adds a cheap and convenient storage solution for diverse modded items collected during exploration, such as seeds and saplings.

Features:

  • There are currently two pouches in the mod, the Seed Pouch and the Sapling Pouch, which can hold seeds and saplings from most mods, respectively.
  • Pouches are crafted with five wool blocks and one of any item that they can hold.
  • Pouches can hold up to a stack of each item.
  • While pouches are in the player's inventory, applicable items are automatically placed in the pouch when picked up, if there’s room.
  • Items can be dropped into the pouch from the player's inventory by right-clicking them on top of the item.
  • Items can be dumped from the pouch into a chest or other container by shift-right-clicking the pouch onto the block.

Planned Features:

  • Better sprites for the pouches
  • A system for creating custom pouches for modpack makers
  • An option to give players pouches when they first join a world

This mod uses code and assets from Botania by Vazkii as allowed per the terms of its license.
